title: Raghav Chadha news live: Ashok Mittal, new AAP RS deputy leader, responds to buzz of Chadha joining BJP
description: Raghav Chadha news live updates: The Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) removed MP Raghav Chadha as the deputy leader of the party in the Rajya Sabha in a surprise move on Thursday and replaced him with another member of Parliament, Ashok Mittal.
